title: mentha × pyramidalis
intro: Mentha × pyramidalis, also known as pyramidal mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha spicata. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and antifungal effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × pyramidalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. The plant's leaves can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
